## [03:00 - 06:00]

Or please pull into the 7-11. We'll go behind and have sex because we've never had sex behind a 7-11 before. Jen instituted pillow fights in our house. ## [06:00 - 06:49]

It was beautiful though. It really was. I can see that deer today. And so I nudged Jen to wake her up and as soon as I moved, it took off. And I remember lying there and thinking, hopefully I will forget someday about the two-headed cow. But I will never forget that deer. And I haven't. I can still see it today. And Jen may have been the antidote for my premature aging, but that deer was too. I remember at that moment I decided that there are going to be times in my life where I do really stupid, insane, nonsensical things. And sometimes I'll end up with something as beautiful as that.
